baseline_only.description: The repo owes only universal baseline artifacts.

archetypes.description: Shipped user-facing product, app, or SaaS.
Package or library imported by other software.
Tooling, configuration, or meta repository that configures other repos.
Research or experiment repo that is not a shipped product.
Repository whose deliverable is a document corpus.

modifiers.description: Handles or defines data needing privacy, retention, deletion, or inventory docs.

composition_order.duplicate_policy: byte-identical rows are de-duplicated; conflicting rows fail conformance
